semanticMetrics.description: Total annual recurring revenue for enterprise accounts. Shows revenue trend and scale of the book of business.
semanticMetrics.label: Annual Recurring Revenue USD

semanticMetrics.description: Average initial response time to support cases over the past 30 days. Indicates responsiveness.
semanticMetrics.label: Avg Initial Response Time Hours (30D)

semanticMetrics.description: Count of critical escalations in the last 30 days, signaling severe customer issues.
semanticMetrics.label: Critical Escalations (30D)

semanticMetrics.description: Average percentage of accounts with managed services adoption. Reflects service attach and expansion.
semanticMetrics.label: Managed Services Penetration

semanticMetrics.description: Average mobility product penetration across accounts.
semanticMetrics.label: Mobility Penetration

semanticMetrics.description: Percentage of account revenue derived from mobility products.
semanticMetrics.label: Mobility Revenue Share

semanticMetrics.description: Count of child accounts per enterprise account, used to understand account complexity and scale.
semanticMetrics.label: Number Of Child Accounts

semanticMetrics.description: Number of open support cases in the last 30 days reflecting current support load.
semanticMetrics.label: Open Support Cases (30D)

semanticMetrics.description: Average index measuring product portfolio diversity within accounts; higher indicates broader adoption.
semanticMetrics.label: Product Diversity Index

semanticMetrics.description: Ratio of support effort relative to account size; higher values indicate disproportionate support load.
semanticMetrics.label: Support Burden Ratio

semanticMetrics.description: Portion of revenue coming from wireline services, useful for product mix analysis.
semanticMetrics.label: Wireline Revenue Share
